ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ic_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the IC design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IC design */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the IC design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the IC design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the IC design was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the IC design (e.g., draft, in review, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ic_pictures" (
  "picture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of IC package (e.g., QFN, WLCSP) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins in the IC package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the IC package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the IC package was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IC package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("picture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IC pin */,
  "qfn_pin" INTEGER /* QFN pin number */,
  "wlcsp_pin" INTEGER /* WLCSP pin number */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the IC pin */,
  "io_type" TEXT /* I/O type of the IC pin */,
  "power_supply" TEXT /* Power supply system of the IC pin */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the IC pin */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Functionality of the IC pin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pin was last updated */,
  "voltage_range" TEXT /* Voltage range for the pin */,
  "current_rating" TEXT /* Current rating for the pin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_pictures" (
  "design_picture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design-package relationship */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC design */,
  "picture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_picture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_pictures_picture_id FOREIGN KEY ("picture_id") REFERENCES ic_pictures ("picture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_pictures_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES ic_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_pins" (
  "design_pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design-pin relationship */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC design */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC pin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_pins_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_pins_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES ic_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "picture_pins" (
  "picture_pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package-pin relationship */,
  "picture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC package */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC pin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("picture_pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picture_pins_picture_id FOREIGN KEY ("picture_id") REFERENCES ic_pictures ("picture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picture_pins_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC design being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the IC design */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the IC design was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES ic_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IC design being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the IC design was revised */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision (if applicable) */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES ic_designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
